title: Computer Science
description: A foundational major focused on programming, algorithms, systems, software design, and computational thinking.

title: Software Engineering
description: Emphasizes building reliable software products, testing, architecture, team development, and delivery practices.

title: Data Science
description: Combines statistics, programming, machine learning, and data visualization to extract insight from data.

title: Information Systems
description: Blends technology and business to design, manage, and support information systems in organizations.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Focuses on network defense, secure systems, cryptography, risk assessment, and protecting digital assets.

title: Human-Computer Interaction
description: Studies how people use technology, including usability, research methods, prototyping, and interface design.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Explores machine learning, intelligent systems, natural language processing, and modern AI methods.

title: Game Development
description: Covers interactive software design, graphics, gameplay systems, and creative programming for games.
